name: zsnd_system_init
description: zSndSystem_Init gates initialization, dispatches the selected backend, loads sound config, and selects legacy or named syntax parsing.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /MD /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for @zSndSystem_Init@8 at 0x4a1420 still fails: 116 unmasked mismatches, 72 relocation bytes masked, 10 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 237 bytes, VC object symbol size 272 bytes.

Functional coverage composes the top-level gate/missing-config path with reviewed backend-provider and syntax-parser smokes. The full successful zSndSystem_Init path still depends on external sound config assets and host audio/A3D provider availability.
